name: plugin remove cleans up the _community/<plugin-id>/ folder and leaves operator namespace untouched
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/ns generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'plugin_id: example
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && printf 'source: {id: x}
' > generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/ns/main.yaml && printf 'rules: []
' > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-remove.sh" example --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt && [ ! -d generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example ] && [ -d generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org ] && echo ok 1>&2
